title: phaseolus compressus var. nanus
intro: Phaseolus compressus var. nanus is a small, annual herb belonging to the legume family, characterized by its compact growth and tiny flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phaseolus compressus var. nanus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically consumed to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other respiratory issues.
